requirements.summary: Update useProxyRequest hook to handle full HTTP responses with body, content-type, and status code from the backend proxy
acceptanceCriteria: The mutation resolves with `{ body: string, contentType: string, statusCode: number }`.
HTML responses are passed through without modification.
Non-HTML binary content (images) is decoded from base64 and surfaced as a data URL.

file_operations.description: Modify the `useProxyRequest` mutation to expect a structured response from the backend actor containing body, content-type header, and status code. Parse the backend response to extract these fields. For binary content types (images), decode base64 body data and convert to data URLs. Return `{ body: string, contentType: string, statusCode: number }` to the caller.

requirements.summary: Update ProxyContent component to render full proxied HTML using srcdoc and rewrite relative URLs to route through the proxy
acceptanceCriteria: The proxied HTML is rendered inside the iframe using `srcdoc` or a Blob URL.
Relative URLs in the HTML (href, src, action attributes) are rewritten to resolve through the proxy.
Clicking links inside the proxied iframe triggers `onNavigate` with the resolved absolute URL.
Form submissions inside the iframe are intercepted and routed through `onNavigate`.
The address bar reflects the currently proxied URL.

file_operations.description: Update the component to accept the full proxied HTML response body and content-type from the parent. Implement URL rewriting logic that parses the HTML string and rewrites all relative URLs (href, src, action attributes) to absolute URLs resolved against the original proxied URL. Render the rewritten HTML inside the iframe using the `srcdoc` attribute instead of a plain `src`. Add an iframe message listener to intercept navigation events (link clicks, form submissions) inside the iframe and call `onNavigate` with the resolved absolute URL. Ensure the address bar reflects the currently proxied URL by syncing it via the parent component's tab state.

requirements.summary: Update BrowserLayout to display loading indicators and error messages during proxy requests
acceptanceCriteria: A loading indicator is visible in the active tab while a proxy request is pending.
If the proxy request fails, an error message is shown in the content area with the failed URL and a retry button.
Successful proxy responses clear any previous error state.

file_operations.description: Add state management for tracking proxy request loading and error states. When a proxy request is initiated, set the loading state and pass it to the TabBar component so a spinner is displayed in the active tab. Handle the mutation result from `useProxyRequest`: on success, clear any previous error state and update the tab content; on failure, store the error message and failed URL in state. In the content rendering area, check for error state and display an inline error message showing the failed URL and a retry button that re-triggers the proxy request. Ensure the loading indicator is cleared when the request completes or fails.
